_prev_dispatch_note_v344: SPA-V344: per-protocol APY/TVL anomaly + dropout detector. Новый ранний health-алерт RiskMonitor.alert_apy_feed_protocol_anomaly — точечный детектор по data/historical_apy.json: строит per-protocol snapshot (apy/tvl_usd из последней записи истории каждого протокола; поддержка ключей protocols/protocol_history; coerce float→None) и сравнивает с persisted prev_snapshot. Аномалия = unreadable ИЛИ протокол ВЫПАЛ из фида между циклами ИЛИ его APY упал ≥60% ИЛИ его TVL упал ≥60%. Закрывает слепое пятно агрегатных алертов (alert_apy_feed_protocol_drop по числу протоколов и alert_apy_feed_tvl_drop по совокупному TVL держатся, а КОНКРЕТНАЯ позиция обваливается/исчезает — covariance/Kelly-вселенная теряет точечный вес). Зеркалит protocol_drop/tvl_drop 1-в-1: top-level try/except→False (never-raise), lazy TelegramSender, persistent state apy_feed_anomaly_health_state.json, streak-порог=1 (мгновенный fire, рефайр на каждом следующем аномальном цикле, healthy сбрасывает streak, prev_snapshot всегда обновляется после оценки). Константы APY_FEED_PROTOCOL_APY_DROP_PCT=0.6 / APY_FEED_PROTOCOL_TVL_DROP_PCT=0.6 (выше агрегатных 0.5, т.к. отдельный протокол волатильнее). export_data.py: зеркальный try/except-блок «APY feed per-protocol anomaly alert» сразу после блока TVL collapse в run_export. Тесты: новый модуль test_apy_feed_protocol_anomaly_monitor.py 30 PASS; регрессия мониторинга (tvl_drop+protocol_drop+stale+covariance_health) 70 PASS, 0 новых фейлов. py_compile risk_monitor.py+export_data.py OK, KANBAN.json валиден, бэкапы .bak.v344. Следующий dev-шаг: SPA-V345 — валидация schema-drift фида historical_apy.json (изменение формы/ключей записей, смена типов apy/tvl_usd, неожиданные поля) ЛИБО per-protocol stale-детектор (конкретный протокол перестал обновляться — generated_at фида свежий, но последняя дата истории одного протокола залипла).
_prev_dispatch_note: SPA-V347: aggregated feed-health summary. Свёл 7 feed/covariance health-сигналов в один data/feed_health_summary.json (overall worst-of) + сводный бейдж в дашборде. Консолидация шести near-duplicate мониторов v3.40-v3.46 в один индикатор — ровно то, что рекомендовал отчёт v5.
_prev_dispatch_note_v346: SPA-V346: per-protocol staleness detector. Новый ранний health-алерт RiskMonitor.alert_apy_feed_protocol_stale — ловит ситуацию, когда КОНКРЕТНЫЙ протокол перестал обновляться (последняя запись его истории старше APY_FEED_PROTOCOL_MAX_AGE_HOURS=48h), хотя фид в ЦЕЛОМ выглядит свежим (generated_at двигается, потому что ОСТАЛЬНЫЕ протоколы обновляются). Закрывает ВРЕМЕННОЕ слепое пятно, которое не видит ни один существующий APY-feed монитор: alert_apy_feed_stale смотрит на feed-level generated_at (один залипший протокол его не двигает), alert_apy_feed_protocol_anomaly смотрит на крах ЗНАЧЕНИЙ apy/tvl и dropout (протокол с замороженными значениями, который просто перестал получать свежие даты, не триггерит ни один из его сигналов). Залипший протокол тихо скармливает устаревшую точку в covariance/dynamic-Kelly вселенную этой позиции. КЛЮЧЕВОЕ ПРОЕКТНОЕ РЕШЕНИЕ: фид имеет СУТОЧНУЮ гранулярность дат (date=YYYY-MM-DD), а пайплайн идёт каждые 4ч (6 циклов/сутки) → внутри суток дата каждого протокола легитимно не меняется между циклами. Поэтому staleness меряется по ВОЗРАСТУ записи в часах (now - last_record_date), НЕ по равенству дат между циклами — здоровый суточный фид никогда не ложно-срабатывает. snapshot=dict[protocol→last_record_date_iso] из последней записи истории каждого протокола (поддержка date/ts/timestamp, bare YYYY-MM-DD→полночь UTC, epoch seconds, protocols/protocol_history). degraded=unreadable ИЛИ есть протоколы с age>48h ИЛИ непарсимая/None дата. Зеркалит anomaly/drop 1-в-1: top-level try/except→False (never-raise), lazy TelegramSender, persistent state apy_feed_protocol_stale_health_state.json, streak-порог=1 (мгновенный fire, рефайр на каждом следующем stale-цикле, healthy сбрасывает streak). export_data.py: зеркальный try/except-блок «APY feed per-protocol staleness alert» сразу после блока schema drift в run_export. Тесты: новый модуль test_apy_feed_protocol_stale_monitor.py 21 PASS; регрессия мониторинга (anomaly+drop+tvl+stale+schema+covariance+alerts) 163 PASS, 0 новых фейлов. py_compile risk_monitor.py+export_data.py OK, KANBAN.json валиден, бэкапы .bak.v346. Следующий dev-шаг: SPA-V347 — агрегированный «APY feed health» summary-индикатор в дашборде (свести staleness + protocol-drop + tvl-drop + anomaly + schema-drift + per-protocol-stale в один статус) ЛИБО реальный end-to-end прогон pg-миграции против тестового PostgreSQL (за SPA_PG_MIGRATION_EXECUTE=1, dry_run=False).

done.title: Fix latent lstrip(0x) bug on private-key path in eth_signer.py
done.note: Same defect class as V353 but on the private-key/signing path: the inline private_key_hex.lstrip('0x') (under a .startswith('0x') guard) strips ANY leading 0/x chars, so significant leading zeros after the 0x prefix (e.g. 0x00ab...) were eaten, producing a shortened/corrupted key (len!=64 -> ValueError or wrong key/address/signature).
done.resolution: Replaced `private_key_hex.lstrip('0x') if private_key_hex.startswith('0x') else ...` with `private_key_hex[2:] if private_key_hex[:2].lower()=='0x' else private_key_hex` at the 3 pk/signing sites in eth_signer.py: line 105 (get_address_from_private_key), line 143 (sign_transaction), line 201 (sign_message). Strips exactly the 0x/0X prefix, preserving leading zero nibbles of the key body. encode_function_call (fixed in V353) untouched.

done.title: APY-feed per-protocol staleness monitoring + alert
done.note: Новый ранний health-алерт на ситуацию, когда КОНКРЕТНЫЙ протокол в data/historical_apy.json перестал обновляться (последняя запись его истории старше 48h), при том что фид в ЦЕЛОМ свежий (generated_at двигается за счёт остальных протоколов). Закрывает ВРЕМЕННОЕ слепое пятно: alert_apy_feed_stale смотрит на feed-level generated_at (один залипший протокол его не сдвигает), alert_apy_feed_protocol_anomaly — на крах ЗНАЧЕНИЙ apy/tvl и dropout (протокол с замороженными значениями, который просто перестал получать свежие даты, не триггерит ни один сигнал). Залипшая позиция тихо кормит устаревшую точку в covariance/Kelly-вселенную. Вторая альтернатива из dispatch-ноты V344 (первую — schema-drift — закрыл V345).
done.resolution: spa_core/alerts/risk_monitor.py: константа APY_FEED_PROTOCOL_MAX_AGE_HOURS=48.0 (последняя запись истории протокола старше = протокол тихо залип) после APY_FEED_SCHEMA_MIN_PROTOCOLS; self._apy_feed_protocol_stale_health_file=data_dir/apy_feed_protocol_stale_health_state.json в __init__ после _apy_feed_schema_health_file. Новый публичный метод RiskMonitor.alert_apy_feed_protocol_stale(feed_path=None, *, snapshot=None, now=None, sender=None) сразу после schema-drift helpers — top-level try/except→False (НИКОГДА не raise), lazy TelegramSender, persistent state, streak-логика. КЛЮЧЕВОЕ ПРОЕКТНОЕ РЕШЕНИЕ: фид суточной гранулярности (date=YYYY-MM-DD), пайплайн 4ч (6 циклов/сутки) → внутри суток дата протокола легитимно не меняется между циклами; поэтому staleness меряется по ВОЗРАСТУ записи в часах (now - last_record_date), а НЕ по равенству дат между циклами — здоровый суточный фид не ложно-срабатывает. snapshot=dict[protocol→last_record_date_raw] из ПОСЛЕДНЕЙ записи истории каждого протокола (резолв из feed: protocols ИЛИ protocol_history, поле date|ts|timestamp). Парсер _parse_dt: epoch seconds (int/float), ISO (с заменой Z), bare YYYY-MM-DD→полночь UTC, naive→UTC, ошибка→None. now: None→datetime.now(utc), naive→utc. degraded если: unreadable (snapshot None) ИЛИ любой протокол с age>48h ИЛИ непарсимой/None датой (freshness неверифицируема→stale). Streak-порог=1: healthy→consecutive_stale=0/last_alerted_cycle=0/last_stale_keys=[]/return False; stale→inc, should_alert=(n>=1 AND n!=last_alerted), рефайр на каждом растущем цикле; last_alerted_cycle=n только после успешной отправки (failed/raised send НЕ двигает last_alerted → ретрай на следующем цикле). HTML msg ⚠️ SPA APY Feed Protocol Stale со списком stale-протоколов (key + age в часах ИЛИ 'no parseable date', лимит 5), нота про устаревший covariance/Kelly-вход. done.title: Live APY covariance export — apy_history_bridge + covariance_export (FEAT-007 finale)
done.implementation: Закрывает последний end-to-end gap FEAT-007. CovarianceEstimator (Phase 1, v3.12) читает rolling APY-серии из data/apy_history.json; Phase 2 врезал его в recommender.py + markowitz.py за SPA_LIVE_COVARIANCE=1. Но apy_history.json пишется только инкрементально APYTracker.record_snapshot в live-цикле — в sandbox/fresh-checkout его нет, поэтому каждый SPA_LIVE_COVARIANCE=1 прогон молча падал в синтетику CV=10%. SPA-V336: (1) spa_core/analytics/apy_history_bridge.py — конвертер существующего data/historical_apy.json ({protocols:{key:[{date,apy,tvl_usd}]}}, реальный 90-дневный DeFiLlama/synthetic экспорт) в APYTracker-схему data/apy_history.json ({protocol_history:{key:[{ts,apy,tvl_usd}]}, last_updated}); date YYYY-MM-DD промотируется в tz-aware ISO ts (T00:00:00+00:00) чтобы парситься через estimator._parse_iso/rolling-window; pure stdlib (json/datetime/pathlib), никогда не падает на happy path (malformed sub-structures скипаются по-записи), ключи protocol_history сортируются для детерминизма; ensure_apy_history() идемпотентен (не трогает существующий store). (2) spa_core/analytics/covariance_export.py — строит CovarianceEstimator над bridged store (авто-мост из historical_apy.json если apy_history.json отсутствует), считает per-protocol volatilities (через summary), полную covariance + correlation матрицу с tier-map (longest-prefix tier_for: aave/compound/morpho/sky=T1, yearn/euler/maple/pendle=T2), data_availability флаги и source-label (live/partial/synthetic_fallback), пишет data/covariance_summary.json (schema_version=1, generated_at, window_days, matrices). CLI у обоих модулей. Артефакты перегенерированы: source=live, 7 протоколов, n_obs=81 (в 90д окне от 2026-05-30), все fallback=false. Интеграция подтверждена: AllocationRecommender().recommend с SPA_LIVE_COVARIANCE=1 теперь возвращает covariance_source=live (раньше — synthetic), без крэша. Существующие call-sites не менялись — синтетический путь (флаг выключен) байт-в-байт прежний.

done.title: Pendle PT adapter (ERC-5115 fixed-rate PT-USDC)
done.implementation: Added spa_core/execution/adapters/pendle_pt_adapter.py (PendlePTAdapter, T2). Pendle Principal Token markets on ethereum: PT-USDC (~6.5% implied fixed APY, maturity 2026-09-24) and PT-USDT (~6.1%, maturity 2026-12-31). ERC-5115 (SY) lifecycle documented: PT minted from SY (mintPyFromSy), redeemed 1:1 to underlying after maturity (redeemPyToToken / SY.redeem); router selectors are Phase 3 placeholders. Style 1:1 with yearn_v3/maple: TxRequest+PositionInfo dataclasses (PositionInfo carries maturity); supply/withdraw return DRY_RUN in dry_run, BLOCKED when mode!=live, NOT_IMPLEMENTED in live (signing=Phase 3); ValueError on bad chain/asset/amount. get_supply_apy short-circuits to _DRY_RUN_APY mock in dry_run; live path uses defillama_apy_feed (live_apy_enabled + get_live_apy('pendle-pt',asset,chain)) with production-safe mock fallback on any error (lazy import in try/except), identical to yearn. Pendle-specific: get_maturity(asset)->ISO date, is_matured(asset,now=None)->bool (UTC-aware, naive treated as UTC), implied_fixed_apy alias. is_healthy always True (PT cannot be liquidated). Registered 'pendle-pt' prefix -> 'pendle_pt' family in engine_bridge.py (_PROTOCOL_PREFIX_TO_FAMILY + _get_adapter lazy import); engine accepts keys like pendle-pt-usdc-ethereum (verified parse -> _get_adapter -> execute_supply dispatch reaches adapter). Added 'pendle-pt'/'pendle' -> 'pendle' to _PROTOCOL_PROJECT_MATCH in defillama_apy_feed.py. stdlib-only (urllib+json), never raises on dry-run happy path. Tests: spa_core/tests/test_pendle_pt_adapter.py (49 tests, all pass via pytest 9.0.3). Updated test_engine_bridge: added test_pendle_pt_key_parses and removed the now-obsolete 'pendle-pt-steth-arbitrum' malformed case (pendle-pt is a supported prefix). Regression: yearn 32 / euler 28 / maple 28 = 88 pass; engine_bridge 36 pass. No real network (defillama_apy_feed mocked via patch on real module funcs; env patched). Two PRE-EXISTING failures unrelated to V328 left untouched: test_engine_bridge morpho-blue-usdc-base parse case (baseline also parses it as family=morpho), and test_defillama_apy_feed TestTtlCache (needs live network, offline sandbox).

done.title: BUG: WHITELIST (15 pools) vs POOL_WHITELIST (12 pools) — dual whitelist inconsistency in defillama_fetcher.py
done.description: defillama_fetcher.py has two whitelists: (1) WHITELIST (line 25, 15 pools, has pool_ids) used by collect_once() → fetch_all() → SQLite ingestion. (2) POOL_WHITELIST (line 144, 12 pools) used by DeFiLlamaFetcher.fetch_pools() → export/display. WHITELIST includes Spark USDC/USDT, Sky sUSDS, Fluid USDC/USDT, Ethena sUSDe which are NOT in POOL_WHITELIST. POOL_WHITELIST includes Compound V3 Arbitrum and Morpho Base which are NOT in WHITELIST. done.title: BUG: export_data.py import path error — `from spa_core.analytics.apy_tracker import APYTracker`
done.description: export_data.py line ~295: `from spa_core.analytics.apy_tracker import APYTracker`. Since sys.path.insert(0, spa_core_dir) is done at the top, the correct import is `from analytics.apy_tracker import APYTracker`. The `spa_core.` prefix causes ImportError at runtime unless the parent of spa_core/ is also on sys.path. This section is wrapped in try/except so it silently fails, but apy_tracker never runs. Fix: change to `from analytics.apy_tracker import APYTracker`.

done.title: LOGIC: auto_allocate_v2() L2 chain set (includes Optimism+Polygon) differs from RiskPolicy L2 set (Arbitrum+Base only)
done.description: engine.py line 560: `_V2_L2_CHAINS = {'arbitrum', 'base', 'optimism', 'polygon'}`. RiskPolicy.l2_allocation_pct() (policy.py line 173): L2_CHAINS = {'arbitrum', 'base'}. Result: v2_aggressive applies L2 cap to 4 chains but RiskPolicy only enforces the cap on 2 chains. Positions on Optimism/Polygon bypass the L2 aggregate limit. Since Optimism/Polygon pools are not in the whitelist today, this is low-risk but the inconsistency is a latent bug.

done.title: BUG: activate.py always blocked — check_wallet_ready() returns PENDING permanently
done.description: golive/activate.py line 101: `all_pass = all(c['status'] == 'PASS' for c in criteria)`. Since check_wallet_ready() always returns PENDING (hardcoded, cannot auto-verify), the activation script WILL NEVER SUCCEED. This blocks the entire go-live path. Fix: either (a) add a manual-override flag/env var `SPA_WALLET_READY=1` that flips wallet criterion to PASS, or (b) exclude Wallet Ready from the `all_pass` check in activate.py the same way checklist.py excludes it from the verdict. Option (b) is simpler and consistent with checklist logic.

done.title: BUG: MIN_PAPER_DAYS=50 contradicts DEV_STRATEGY 8-week (56-day) requirement
done.description: golive/checklist.py line 39: `MIN_PAPER_DAYS = 50`. DEV_STRATEGY says '8+ weeks' = 56 days. engine.py uses `MIN_PAPER_WEEKS = 8` = 56 days. If checklist.py passes at 50 days, go-live could be unlocked 6 days early (Jul 9 instead of Jul 15). SPA-016 done card also specifies '≥56d'. Fix: change MIN_PAPER_DAYS to 56 in checklist.py.

done.title: LOGIC: _update_strategy_state() calls _load_portfolio_state() inside open DB transaction — read-before-commit
done.description: engine.py _update_strategy_state(conn) at line 1127 calls self._load_portfolio_state() which opens its OWN new DB connection. This is called while the caller already holds a write transaction (e.g., after INSERT paper_trade). In SQLite WAL mode, the inner read may see the pre-INSERT state, so strategy_state gets updated with stale position counts. The Sharpe stored in strategy_state may lag by one trade. Fix: pass the already-loaded state as a parameter to _update_strategy_state() instead of re-loading from DB.

done.title: DEBT: Dead code — avg_days variable in close_position() (engine.py line 225)
done.description: engine.py line 225: `avg_days = total_pnl / (total_amount * 0.0001 + 1)  # approx`. This variable is computed but never used or returned. The formula is also mathematically meaningless (PnL / fraction_of_amount). Remove this line to avoid confusion about what it calculates.

done.title: DEBT: Redundant check #7 in check_new_position() — T1 absolute cap equals T1 concentration limit
done.description: risk/policy.py: Check #6 enforces max_concentration_t1=40%. Check #7 enforces max_single_protocol=40%. For T1 protocols these are identical — check #7 can never trigger without check #6 already triggering. For T2 protocols, max_concentration_t2=20% means check #6 fires well before check #7 (40% cap). The absolute single-protocol check is effectively dead code. Consider either removing check #7 or changing max_single_protocol to a meaningful lower threshold (e.g., 35%).

done.title: BUG: Sharpe threshold mismatch — checklist uses ≥1.0, DEV_STRATEGY requires ≥2.0
done.description: golive/checklist.py check_strategy_performance() line 182: PASS when sharpe >= 1.0. DEV_STRATEGY v1.0 go-live criteria: 'Sharpe ≥ 2.0'. This means the automated checker could give a green light at Sharpe=1.1 when the stated go-live bar is 2.0. Decision needed: (a) keep ≥1.0 in code and update DEV_STRATEGY, or (b) raise code threshold to 2.0. Recommend (b): set threshold=2.0 consistent with DEV_STRATEGY. WARN range: 1.0–2.0. FAIL: <1.0.
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: BUG: daily_report.py max_dd display — fallback uses raw fraction (0.01) but formats as percent
done.description: alerts/daily_report.py lines 176-177: fallback `max_dd = portfolio.get('total_drawdown_pct', None) or 0.0`. status.json stores total_drawdown_pct as a decimal fraction (0.012 = 1.2%). Then line 222: `f'MaxDD: {max_dd:.1f}%'` formats without ×100, showing '0.0%' instead of '1.2%'. This only triggers when advanced_analytics.json is unavailable. Fix: multiply by 100 when falling back: `max_dd = (portfolio.get('total_drawdown_pct') or 0.0) * 100`.
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: LOGIC: check_diversification() uses deployed-only denominator, inconsistent with RiskPolicy
done.description: golive/checklist.py check_diversification() line 275: `frac = amt / total_deployed` (cash excluded). RiskPolicy.concentration_pct() uses `total / total_capital_usd` (cash included). Result: go-live checker sees higher concentration than RiskPolicy would, potentially blocking go-live when actual risk policy is fine. Example: 1 protocol, $30K in Aave, $70K cash → checker shows 100% concentration (FAIL), RiskPolicy shows 30% (OK). Fix: use `total_capital` as denominator in check_diversification().
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: LOGIC: check_drawdown_acceptable() FAIL threshold (4%) inconsistent with RiskPolicy kill switch (5%)
done.description: golive/checklist.py FAIL at drawdown >4%. RiskPolicy max_drawdown_stop=5%. DEV_STRATEGY says '≤5%'. A portfolio with 4.5% drawdown would: (a) pass RiskPolicy health check, (b) still be running, but (c) FAIL the go-live checker. This could incorrectly block go-live when the system is actually healthy. Fix: align go-live FAIL threshold with RiskPolicy kill switch at 5%. Suggest: PASS ≤3%, WARN 3–4.5%, FAIL >5% (= kill switch triggers).
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: FEAT-005 Phase 2 — Compound V3 read-only RPC integration
done.description: Second phase of FEAT-005 Compound V3 Live SDK Integration. Replaces the Phase 1 NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs of get_supply_apy and get_supply_balance with real on-chain eth_call decoding when dry_run=False. Mirrors SPA-V36-001 (Aave V3 Phase 2) 1:1: pure stdlib (urllib.request + json), no web3.py, no requests, no eth_account. New _eth_call helper (5s timeout, DEBUG logging of RPC URL + selector), _call_with_fallback round-robin across the 3 endpoints per chain (URL fragment #compound-v3-comet:... stripped before POST). Hardcoded selectors 0x6f307dc3 (getUtilization), 0x6fb1b0e9 (getSupplyRate(uint256)), 0x70a08231 (balanceOf). Balance pipeline: Comet.balanceOf(SPA_WALLET_ADDRESS env) → uint256 raw → divide by 10**6 (USDC base asset only on all chains in scope). Note: Comet's balanceOf already returns presentValue (incl. accrued interest), so no aToken-style indirection — one RPC call per asset, simpler than Aave's two-leg getReserveData+balanceOf round-trip. APY pipeline: two chained eth_calls — (1) Comet.getUtilization() → uint256 utilization (1e18-scaled), (2) Comet.getSupplyRate(utilization) → uint64 per-second rate (1e18-scaled). Annualised APY (%) = rate * SECONDS_PER_YEAR / 1e16 = rate * 31_536_000 / 1e18 * 100. Production-safe fallback: ALL live-path exceptions logged as [FALLBACK] WARNING and degraded to the Phase 1 _MOCK_APYS / _MOCK_BALANCES value (pipeline never crashes if RPC flakes or wallet env is missing). Write methods (supply / withdraw) still NOT_IMPLEMENTED — Phase 3 will add eth_account signing + raw eth_sendRawTransaction, paired with FEAT-004 Phase 3 cutover behind SPA_EXECUTION_MODE env flag.

done.description: Second phase of FEAT-006 Real-Time Price Feeds. Replaces the Phase 1 'always-None' RPC scaffold in spa_core/data_pipeline/price_feeds.py with real Chainlink AggregatorV3.latestAnswer() eth_call decoding when dry_run=False. Mirrors SPA-V36-001 (Aave V3 Phase 2) and SPA-V37-001 (Compound V3 Phase 2) 1:1: pure stdlib (urllib.request + json), no web3.py, no requests, no eth_account. New _eth_call helper (5s timeout, DEBUG logging of RPC URL + selector), _strip_fragment_with_hint dispatcher that parses '#chainlink:<feed_addr>' fragments off each RPC URL and routes to the right decoder. Hardcoded selector 0x50d25bcd (latestAnswer()), CHAINLINK_DECIMALS=8 (all USDC/USDT/DAI mainnet feeds), two's-complement int256 decoder. Production-safe fallback: ALL live-path exceptions logged as [FALLBACK] WARNING and degraded — at endpoint level returns None so the next endpoint tries; at fetch_prices level, if every endpoint for a coin yields None, that coin falls back to its deterministic synthetic backup. Zero-address placeholder feeds (e.g. USDS which has no mainnet Chainlink feed yet) short-circuit before the timeout. Sanity gate rejects insane decoded prices (≤0 or >$1000). New dry_run constructor parameter (default True) preserves Phase 1 byte-identical behaviour for all existing call-sites — only PriceFeedFetcher(dry_run=False) activates real RPC. Pyth and RedStone legs of the 3-RPC fallback remain deferred — they require different decoders (HTTP JSON gateway) and ship in a later sprint. The endpoint registry retains all three slots so operators see the intended fallback order. FEAT-006 Phase 3 (depeg → risk policy kill-switch) was already shipped in SPA-V31-001 / v3.1, so this Phase 2 work effectively closes the meaningful execution scope of FEAT-006 — synthetic feeds remain the production default until on-chain validation completes.

done.title: FEAT-004/005 Phase 4 — engine.py LIVE execution wiring via LiveExecutionBridge
done.description: Phase 4 closes the FEAT-004 (Aave V3) and FEAT-005 (Compound V3) live-execution loop by wiring the v3.9/v3.10 signed-tx adapters into spa_core/paper_trading/engine.py (PaperTrader.open_position / close_position) behind a multi-layer safety gate. New module spa_core/execution/engine_bridge.py exposes LiveExecutionBridge with execute_supply(protocol_key, amount_usd) / execute_withdraw(protocol_key, amount_usd) and internal _parse_protocol_key() that splits 'aave-v3-usdc-ethereum' → (family=aave_v3, asset=USDC, chain=ethereum) — supports aave-v3-* and compound-v3-* prefixes, returns None on anything malformed. The bridge is invoked ONLY when both (a) PaperTrader was constructed with live_execution=True (new ctor kwarg, default False — preserves byte-identical behaviour for 100+ existing call-sites) AND (b) SPA_EXECUTION_MODE=live env var is set; otherwise returns {status: SKIPPED, reason: execution_mode_paper}. Adapters are imported LAZILY inside the bridge's _get_adapter() (not module-top) and cached per (family, chain) pair. Paper-trades SQLite INSERT/UPDATE is UNCONDITIONAL — the live leg is purely additive; if the adapter returns FAILED/BLOCKED/ERROR or raises, the bridge logs a structured WARNING + audit row and the engine continues with the paper write. NEVER raises. Audit log at data/live_execution_log.json is a flat JSON array capped at 1000 entries (oldest dropped on rollover); all I/O wrapped in try/except so audit failures never block a paper trade. close_position routes withdraws to the exact protocol the position was opened on (read from paper_trades.protocol_key). New docs/ADR_011_engine_live_cutover.md documents the design + multi-layer gate stack + operational notes. New spa_core/tests/test_engine_bridge.py — 37 deterministic tests (parsing happy paths + 9 malformed-input parametrisations, SPA_EXECUTION_MODE gate variants, SKIPPED branches, live SUCCESS for both families, FAILED/BLOCKED/raises all swallowed, regression gate proving live_execution=False is a strict no-op even with SPA_EXECUTION_MODE=live, audit-log rotation at LOG_MAX_ENTRIES=1000, corrupted-log file recovery, paper INSERT survives live-leg failure). Test result: 37/37 PASS. done.title: FEAT-007 Phase 1 — Live APY Covariance Estimator + Dynamic Kelly scaffold
done.description: First phase of FEAT-007 Advanced Kelly Sizing with Live Data. Replaces the synthetic CV=10% per-protocol volatility and tier-based correlation constants used by markowitz.py/kelly.py with a real rolling-window estimator over data/apy_history.json (the APYTracker store). New module spa_core/analytics/covariance_estimator.py exposes CovarianceEstimator with: protocols(), compute_volatility(window_days=90, synthetic_apy fallback), compute_correlation(window_days=90, same_tier fallback), compute_covariance_matrix() (symmetric, diagonal=σ², σ_i*σ_j*ρ_ij off-diagonal), compute_correlation_matrix() (diagonal=1.0 exactly), summary() (JSON-ready, marks per-protocol fallback=True when n_obs<7). Pure stdlib (json, math, statistics, datetime); zero numpy/scipy. MIN_OBSERVATIONS=7 cold-start threshold; below threshold returns the same synthetic value markowitz already uses (lock-step constants: SYNTHETIC_APY_CV=0.10, SYNTHETIC_SAME_TIER_CORR=0.6, SYNTHETIC_CROSS_TIER_CORR=0.2). Time-aligned Pearson on the intersection of timestamps (no interpolation). New module spa_core/optimization/dynamic_kelly.py exposes dynamic_kelly_fraction/dynamic_half_kelly/dynamic_position_size — variance-Kelly f* = (μ - r_f) / σ² with strict cold-start delegation: when volatility_pp is None or ≤ 0, returns EXACTLY the value of the classical kelly.* counterpart (byte-identical for every existing 100+ call-site). r_f hard-coded to 5.0% matching markowitz/engine. Phase 2 will wire CovarianceEstimator into Markowitz behind SPA_LIVE_COVARIANCE=1 env flag; Phase 3 will retire the synthetic path post-go-live. ADR-012 documents the 3-phase rollout, alternatives considered (EWMA/Ledoit-Wolf/risk-parity rejected with rationale), and rollback (git rm of two files since Phase 1 is purely additive). Tests: 31 in test_covariance_estimator.py (ISO parsing × 4, safe_stdev/safe_pearson × 7, protocols() × 3, compute_volatility live+fallback × 5, compute_correlation × 6, matrix symmetry/diagonal/subset × 4, summary shape × 3) + 21 in test_dynamic_kelly.py (fallback parity × 7 across 5 input regimes + half-kelly/position-size parity, variance-Kelly known values × 6, cap/half-kelly/zero-input invariants × 4). 52/52 PASS in 0.06s, zero network, zero DB. Regression: test_optimization + test_apy_tracker + test_analytics 80/80 PASS. FEAT-007 remains open pending Phases 2 + 3.

done.title: Adaptive Monitoring Intervals
done.description: Different monitoring frequency by strategy tier: T1 lending → every 4-6 hours (APY changes slowly). T2 LP → every 30 minutes (IL accumulates unnoticed). T3 yield loop → every 3-5 minutes (Health Factor can drop from 1.5 to 1.1 in 20 min on market movement — delay = liquidation). Current monolithic 4h polling is an architectural risk for T3.
done.notes: Разная частота мониторинга по tier стратегии: T1 lending → каждые 4-6 часов (APY меняется медленно). T2 LP → каждые 30 минут (IL накапливается незаметно). T3 yield loop → каждые 3-5 минут (Health Factor может упасть с 1.5 до 1.1 за 20 мин при движении рынка — промедление = ликвидация). Текущий монолитный 4h polling — архитектурный риск для T3.

done.title: Bull Cycle Detector + Dynamic Tier Allocation
done.description: Automatic detection of bull/bear market cycle based on systemic APY growth in the market. In bull: gradual shift of T2 allocation cap 20%→35%, T3 5%→20% by defined thresholds (median market APY >8% for 7 days). In bear: return to conservative caps. Historically in bull cycles stable APYs were 10-18% — the system must be able to switch in minutes, not days. Input data: DefiLlama yields API (already in data pipeline).
done.notes: Автоматическое определение bull/bear рыночного цикла по системному росту APY на рынке. При bull: плавный сдвиг allocation cap T2 20%→35%, T3 5%→20% по заданным порогам (median market APY >8% за 7 дней). При bear: возврат к консервативным caps. Исторически в bull cycles APY на стейблах был 10-18% — система должна быть готова переключиться за минуты, не дни. Входные данные: DefiLlama yields API (уже есть в data pipeline).

done.title: Covariance health monitoring + alert (consecutive synthetic_fallback/failed cycles)
done.implementation: Ковариационная деградация (source==synthetic_fallback несколько циклов подряд или падение секции 13b) была невидима для алертинга — alert_pipeline_failure срабатывает только на sections_failed>2 / pools==0. Добавлен covariance-specific health-мониторинг + Telegram-алерт. (1) spa_core/alerts/risk_monitor.py: константа COVARIANCE_DEGRADED_CYCLES_ALERT=3 после CASH_BUFFER_MIN_PCT; новый метод RiskMonitor.alert_covariance_degraded(cov_source, sender=None, *, section_failed=False) сразу после alert_pipeline_failure, зеркалит его структуру (HTML-сообщение с emoji+<b>, lazy TelegramSender, send в try/except, никогда не пробрасывает). degraded = section_failed or cov_source in (None,'','synthetic_fallback'); healthy = 'live'|'partial'. State-файл self.data_dir/covariance_health_state.json (helpers _load_covariance_health_state/_write_covariance_health_state в стиле _load_prev_apys; graceful — на miss/corrupt свежий {consecutive_degraded:0,last_source:None,last_alerted_cycle:0,updated_at:None}). Healthy → сброс streak в 0, last_alerted_cycle=0, return False. Degraded → инкремент consecutive_degraded. Правило алерта: fire при consecutive_degraded>=threshold AND consecutive_degraded!=last_alerted_cycle → срабатывает один раз на пороге и снова на каждом следующем цикле растущего streak; после отправки last_alerted_cycle=n. Весь метод в top-level try/except → return False, никогда не падает в пайплайн. (2) spa_core/export_data.py: covariance_source:None в инициализации _health; в секции 13b success-ветка _health['covariance_source']=cov_doc.get('source'), except-ветка ='synthetic_fallback'; отдельный try/except блок после Pipeline failure alert — RiskMonitor(data_dir=OUTPUT_DIR).alert_covariance_degraded(_cov_src, sender=TelegramSender(), section_failed='covariance_summary' in failed_sections), зеркалит import-стиль (from alerts.risk_monitor import RiskMonitor). (3) Тесты spa_core/tests/test_covariance_health_monitor.py — pytest, offline, FakeSender.

Метод никогда не пробрасывает исключение в пайплайн.
